nasb.text: Then he found another man and said, “Please strike me.” And the man struck him, wounding him.

esv.text: Then he found another man and said, “Strike me, please.” And the man struck him—struck him and wounded him.

cnv.text: 先知的門徒又遇見另一個人，對他說：“你打我吧！”那人就打他，把他打傷。

ccb.text: 那先知又找了一个人，叫那人打他，那人就打他，把他打伤了。
